title: Tropic Madness
writer: Randolph Bartlett, Wyndham Gittens, Ramon Romero
actors: Leatrice Joy, Lena Malena, George Barraud
plot: Herbert Pomeroy's wife Juanita spends his money extravagantly and irresponsibly, finally driving him to bankruptcy. Desperate, he sends his son Frankie to live with his friend Henderson, a South Seas trader, then commits suicide. ...
